description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named macOS CI that runs on every push to main and on pull requests. The workflow has multiple jobs: build-openbios, macos-intel-build-and-test, publish-intel-app, macos-arm-build-and-test, and publish-arm-app. These jobs handle building OpenBIOS, building and testing PCSX-Redux on macOS Intel and ARM, and publishing the applications.
